lore.english:
Taimanin and is a student of Gosha Academy. Though earnest and somewhat rigid, she has a cautious personality and rarely speaks up on her own.

She enjoys her school life with Shinohara Mari, Kasumigaoka Rika, Shimizu Kanna, and others, and is affectionately called "Mai-chan" by those around her. She has a unique way of addressing others—for example, she calls her classmate Shinohara Mari "Senior Mari-chan", while calling her actual senior Shimizu Kanna "Senior Kan-chan".

User of “Paper Spirit”, a supernatural ninja art that enhances paper by infusing it with Taimanin particles. The reinforced paper can be used to create durable barriers, bind enemies, or transform into sharp blades or explosives, making it highly versatile in combat.

While visiting the simulator for her usual self-training, she happens to witness Murasaki attempting to persuade Asagi. Out of consideration, she is allowed to enter the training room first, but ends up falling into a trap set by a demon realm doctor that was originally meant for Murasaki, leading to an incident where she is bound by an "Eternal Vow".

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&DEF] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase DEF of Agility allies by 15% in All Battles
skills.description_readable: Increase DEF of Agility allies by 15% in All Battles

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Heart's Toss[-]
skills.description:
Creates a paper lotus to attack the selected enemy and 2 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] enemies.
[&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] increases in proportion to DEF.
skills.description_readable:
Creates a paper lotus to attack the selected enemy and 2 Random enemies.
DMG increases in proportion to DEF.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Lotus's Oath[-]
skills.description:
Throws a giant paper lotus to attack [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
On the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2550202]%)[-] [&AtkDown] on targets hit by the lotus at a [&Color_Cyan][R:2550202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2550202] turn(s)
If the target is [&Color_Green][&Technique][-] type, additionally inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2550203]%)[-] [&CriRateDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:2550203]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2550203] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Throws a giant paper lotus to attack ALL enemies.
On the Last Attack, inflicts (-30%) ATK DOWN on targets hit by the lotus at a 99% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
If the target is Technique type, additionally inflicts (-32.5%) CRIT Rate DOWN at a 90% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Lotus Mai[-]
skills.description:
Wraps herself in a giant paper flower for protection.
Gains [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2550304]%)[-] [&DefUp].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2550301] turn(s)
Grants [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2550302]%)[-] [&AllyProtection] and [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2550301]%)[-] [&Strengthen] to 1 selected ally.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2550301] turn(s)
If the target's type is [&Color_Blue][&Agility][-] or [&Color_Green][&Technique][-], [&AllyProtection] effect increases by [&Color_Cyan][V3:2550303]%[-].
skills.description_readable:
Wraps herself in a giant paper flower for protection.
Gains (40%) DEF UP.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
Grants (45%) Protect Ally and (19.5%) Power-up to 1 selected ally.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
If the target's type is Agility or Technique, Protect Ally effect increases by 15%.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Paper Taimanin[-]
skills.description:
On [&Common_Word_Skill_RoundStart], applies [&ActiveSkillBlock] to the fastest enemy.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2550402] turn(s)
If the character has [&Shield], damage taken decreases by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2550401]%)[-].
skills.description_readable:
On Round Start, applies Active Skill Disable to the fastest enemy.
Duration: 1 turn(s)
If the character has Shield, damage taken decreases by (-7.5%).

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_25501]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_25502]
skill_data.description:
Throws a giant paper lotus to attack [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
On the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2551202]%)[-] [&CriRateDown] on the hit target at a [&Color_Cyan][R:2551202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2551202] turn(s)
If the target is [&Color_GreenYellow][&Class_SPT][-] type, additionally inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:2551203]%)[-] [&AccDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:2551203]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2551203] turn(s)
skill_data.description_readable:
Throws a giant paper lotus to attack ALL enemies.
On the Last Attack, inflicts (-25%) CRIT Rate DOWN on the hit target at a 75% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
If the target is Support Type type, additionally inflicts (-25%) ACC DOWN at a 90% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_25502]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_25504]
skill_data.description:
On [&Common_Word_Skill_RoundStart], applies [&ActiveSkillBlock] to the 2 fastest targets, regardless of whether they're allies or enemies.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:2551402] turn(s)
When hit by [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalAttack], damage taken decreases by [&Color_Cyan][V3:2551401]%[-].
skill_data.description_readable:
On Round Start, applies Active Skill Disable to the 2 fastest targets, regardless of whether they're allies or enemies.
Duration: 1 turn(s)
When hit by CRIT ATK, damage taken decreases by -7.5%.
